pg-01-title.script: This chapter demonstrates page layouts: title, section, and full-width card.

pg-02-section.script: The section page features a colored accent bar, title, subtitle, and a full-width content card.

pg-03-fullwidth.script: A full-width card layout for code samples and large text blocks via Markdown.

pg-01-title.script: This chapter showcases multi-column and list layouts with cyan theme.

pg-02-main-side.script: Two-column layout placing main content on the left and key insights on the right.

pg-03-equal-split.script: Side-by-side comparison of two programming approaches.

pg-04-checklist.script:
A vertical checklist with numbered items.
Each card has an icon, title, and description.
Wide cards fill the canvas horizontally.

pg-01-title.script: This chapter demonstrates chart, timeline, and content showcase layouts with amber theme.

pg-02-chart.script: Bar chart comparing model accuracy with an insight card on the right.

pg-03-timeline.script:
A horizontal timeline showing the software development lifecycle.
Each step card includes a number badge, title, and description.

pg-04-markdown.script: Markdown component rendering LaTeX formulas, GFM tables, and task lists.

pg-05-markdown-continue.script: Code block with syntax highlighting and a comparison table of sorting algorithms.

pg-06-mermaid.script: A Mermaid flowchart showing input validation logic with retry branching.

pg-07-sequence-continue.script: A sequence diagram showing user, app, and database interaction with success and error paths.

pg-08-mindmap-continue.script: A mindmap showing the structure of web development technologies across frontend, backend, and DevOps.

pg-09-gantt-continue.script: A Gantt chart showing a project timeline with planning, development, and launch phases.

pg-10-checklist-continue.script: A standalone checklist page with task items and resource links rendered via Markdown.

pg-01-overlap.script: This page tests sibling OVERLAP detection. Two boxes intentionally overlap.

pg-02-canvas-overflow.script: This page tests canvas EXCEED detection. Boxes extend beyond 1920x1080.

pg-03-parent-overflow.script: This page tests parent OVERFLOW detection. Child box extends beyond its parent.

pg-04-clean.script: Clean control page — zero collisions expected.
